calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday April 2, 2015 in Department 525:
David L. Linn, Esq. of LOW, BALL, & LYNCH (415)981-6630, Specially Appearance, for Appellant/Defendant GREEN DREAMS TOURS, LLC.- owner Elie Sasson who is also present with witnesses Ryan Salvo/driver and Jonathan Rushing.
Edward Hugo and Heidi Hugo, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Edward Hugo testifies on his own behalf. Heidi Hugo testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
EXHR (A) Group exhibits - 6 pages photos, one large poster board picture of Van Ness/Bush street presented in the Court, 10/15/14 e-mail, invoice of damages, repair order, etc.

Ryan Salvo, driver, testifies on his own behalf under direct examination of Counsel Linn and responds to the questions from the Court. Counsel Linn examines witness Jonathan Rushing. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - 1 photo

Mr. Hugo cross examines Mr. Rushing and Mr. Solvo.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court. The poster board picture took it back by Respondents/Plaintiffs.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Judgment Entered
